use_cases: Display current weather conditions with temperature, location, and weather icons in a clean card layout
Present weather forecasts in dashboard applications with multiple card instances
Show weather alerts or warnings with customizable header and content sections
Create weather comparison views by stacking multiple weather cards
Embed weather widgets in mobile apps or websites with consistent styling
ai_summary: A composite card component system designed for weather display applications, featuring modular sub-components (CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter) that enable flexible weather information layouts. Built with shadcn/ui styling patterns for seamless integration into dashboards, mobile apps, or media applications requiring weather data presentation.
